title: 4 Infrastructure Stocks That Will Thrive Even if There's a Recession in 2024
text: Sterling Infrastructure and other obvious beneficiaries of massive governmental spending have already seen their stocks surge in anticipation. Here are some others.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Industrial Stocks to Buy in September 2023
text: According to Morningstar , industrial stocks are affiliated with companies that manufacture machinery, handheld tools, industrial products, aerospace, defense and transportation. The best industrial stocks to buy are those that are heavily exposed to the energy revolution, U.S. economic growth, government infrastructure spending and the onshoring trend.

title: Quanta Services Releases 2022 Sustainability Report
text: Details Progress Across Key Sustainability Pillars and Highlights Our Leading Role in Enabling the Energy Transition HOUSTON , Sept. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today the release of its 2022 Sustainability Report.

title: Why Quanta Services (PWR) is a Top Stock for the Long-Term

title: Will Infrastructure Demand Continue to Aid Quanta (PWR)?
text: More demand for infrastructural solutions, buyouts and solid backlog aid Quanta (PWR). However, high costs are a concern.
